task_completion.description: Verify the first London Engineering laptop is correctly renamed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the asset list or asset details page in the Snipe-IT web interface showing the asset with tag 'ASSET-8001' having the exact Asset Name 'LON-ENG-ASSET-8001'.

task_completion.description: Verify the second London Engineering laptop is correctly renamed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the asset list or asset details page in the Snipe-IT web interface showing the asset with tag 'ASSET-8002' having the exact Asset Name 'LON-ENG-ASSET-8002'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Berlin Engineering laptop is correctly renamed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the asset list or asset details page in the Snipe-IT web interface showing the asset with tag 'ASSET-8003' having the exact Asset Name 'BER-ENG-ASSET-8003'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Tokyo Engineering laptop is correctly renamed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the asset list or asset details page in the Snipe-IT web interface showing the asset with tag 'ASSET-8004' having the exact Asset Name 'TYO-ENG-ASSET-8004'.

task_completion.description: Verify that Marketing department laptops were not renamed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the asset list showing asset tags 'ASSET-8005' and 'ASSET-8006'. Their Asset Names must NOT follow the new [Location]-[Department]-[Tag] convention and should remain in their original state.

task_completion.description: Verify that unassigned ('Ready to Deploy') laptops were not renamed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the asset list showing asset tag 'ASSET-8007'. Its Asset Name must NOT follow the new [Location]-[Department]-[Tag] convention and should remain in its original state.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Snipe-IT web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the Snipe-IT web application in a browser, clicking edit buttons, and saving forms, rather than using terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual Snipe-IT application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shown must be the genuine Snipe-IT asset management system, not a text editor, mocked HTML page, or a spreadsheet.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent didn't just type the expected hostnames into a text file or console.
integrity.visual_evidence: The expected hostnames must appear within the proper 'Asset Name' fields of the Snipe-IT asset records, not just printed in a terminal or written in a notepad application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The exact target hostnames required are 'LON-ENG-ASSET-8001', 'LON-ENG-ASSET-8002', 'BER-ENG-ASSET-8003', and 'TYO-ENG-ASSET-8004'. Marketing assets ('ASSET-8005', 'ASSET-8006') and unassigned assets ('ASSET-8007') must remain unmodified.
